docs.title: On-call handoff 2026-05-04
docs.content:
On-call Handoff 2026-05-04

Participants: lena, mike, nora

lena: Handing off to mike for the week. Key items: SENTRY-1012 is resolved, but watch for Stripe webhook retries through Monday.
mike: Got it. I'll keep an eye on the billing-service error rate.
nora: Also reach out to alice if you see anything weird in auth - she owns that area.

docs.title: BILL-90: Monitor Stripe webhook retry backlog
docs.content:
Issue BILL-90: Monitor Stripe webhook retry backlog after SENTRY-1012 fix
Status: In Progress
Assignee: mike
Description: After the Stripe API version fix, Stripe may replay up to 3 days of failed webhook events. Monitor billing-service event processing queue for spikes.

expected_edges.note: Meeting notes briefly mention alice as the owner of auth, a passing reference rather than a full discussion
Meeting briefly names billing-service when instructing the new on-call to watch its error rate
